case_title: SANTIAGA FERREL VS. KIRK LON JILES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF SANTIAGA FERREL RE: NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERREL, SANTIAGA
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-24-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-13-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00) SERVED SEP-21-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JILES, KIRK LON

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FERREL, SANTIAGA AS TO DEFENDANT JILES, KIRK LON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FERREL, SANTIAGA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERREL, SANTIAGA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JILES, KIRK LON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
